title: Track Uses of 'FIXME' Tags
description: This rule is designed to track the usage of 'FIXME' tags. These tags are typically used to mark areas where a bug is suspected, but the developer intends to address it at a later time. However, these tags can often be overlooked or forgotten. This rule ensures that 'FIXME' tags do not go unnoticed.
recommendation: Review the 'FIXME' tags and address the suspected bugs. If the issue has been resolved, remove the 'FIXME' tag.
impact: Ignoring 'FIXME' tags can lead to unresolved bugs that can affect the functionality and reliability of the code. Tracking and addressing these tags can greatly improve the code quality.

checks.message: Review the 'FIXME' tags and address the suspected bugs. If the issue has been resolved, remove the 'FIXME' tag.
